mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_chemical_incoming WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_chemical_incoming WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_chemical_incoming WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT * FROM tb_chemical_incoming WHERE deleted = 0
AND (incoming_no LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR chemical_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR supplier LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR handler LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%')
ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_chemical_incoming WHERE deleted = 0
AND (incoming_no LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR chemical_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR supplier LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR handler LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_chemical_incoming ( incoming_date, incoming_no, chemical_name, supplier, quantity, unit, warehouse_code, handler, msds_confirmed, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{incomingDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{incomingNo}, #{chemicalName}, #{supplier}, #{quantity}, #{unit}, #{warehouseCode}, #{handler}, #{msdsConfirmed}, #{deleted}, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_chemical_incoming SET incoming_date = #{incomingDate,jdbcType=DATE}, incoming_no = #{incomingNo}, chemical_name = #{chemicalName}, supplier = #{supplier}, quantity = #{quantity}, unit = #{unit}, warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode}, handler = #{handler}, msds_confirmed = #{msdsConfirmed}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_chemical_incoming SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
